mapper.select: SELECT ID, EDU_TITLE, EDU_DETAIL, EDU_DIA, EDU_IS_DELETED FROM TBL_EDU WHERE EDU_IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY ID DESC
SELECT ID, EDU_TITLE, EDU_DETAIL, EDU_DIA, EDU_IS_DELETED FROM TBL_EDU WHERE ID = #{id} AND EDU_IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EDU.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_EDU(ID, EDU_TITLE, EDU_DETAIL, EDU_DIA, EDU_IS_DELETED) VALUES(#{id}, #{eduTitle}, #{eduDetail}, #{eduDia}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT ID, EDU_TITLE, EDU_DETAIL, EDU_DIA, EDU_IS_DELETED FROM TBL_EDU WHERE EDU_IS_DELETED = 1 ORDER BY ID DESC
